market_summary: Live conditions indicate a risk-off sentiment, causing setups to remain unconfirmed.

failed_conditions: RCL has not consolidated above 263.00 and is not confirmed by outperforming cruise peers while crude is under pressure
RCL.monitor_reason: The conditions for entry have not been met.
RCL.execution_condition: Only upgrade this to an entry if RCL consolidates above 263.00 after the open and cruise peers keep outperforming while crude stays under pressure.

failed_conditions: NVDA has not maintained above 172.00 or retaken the 174.00 area; semiconductors are not confirming higher
NVDA.monitor_reason: The conditions for entry have not been met.
NVDA.execution_condition: Only consider a trade if NVDA stays above 172.00 and retakes the 174.00 area with semiconductors confirming higher after the opening volatility settles.

failed_conditions: KBH has not been holding 51.00 or better after the first 30 minutes; homebuilders are not confirmed on the broader risk-on tape
KBH.monitor_reason: The conditions for buying have not been met.
KBH.execution_condition: Only buy if KBH is holding 51.00 or better after the first 30 minutes and homebuilders are not lagging the broader risk-on tape.

billing_balance_before_workflow.reason: Rate-limit headers are available, but billing/credit balance is not available from these request responses.

_meta.quota_note: Billing balance is not exposed by normal request responses. This repo records token usage and any quota errors returned by the provider.
